headline: Oil Prices Slide on US-Iran Deal: 3 Energy Stocks Worth Watching
summary: ExxonMobil, ConocoPhillips and EOG Resources stand out as low-cost, diversified production bases that may help them stay profitable despite oil-price volatility.
